summary: Social Testimonial Wall component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的评价墙组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/social-testimonial-wall/src/SocialTestimonialWall.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `SocialTestimonialWall` and `socialTestimonialWallDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Social Testimonial Wall Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/social-testimonial-wall to my project. Preserve the exported SocialTestimonialWallProps API and register the SocialTestimonialWall composition with the default props.
